title: chore: update app metrics 2026-06-02
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: Watering the Greenhouse
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just finished its daily rounds, updating health metrics for all the apps in the greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of app metrics and health checks in APPS.md and GREENHOUSE.md.
gist.impact: Keeps the community app directory and greenhouse metrics up to date with the latest health statuses.
gist.visual_concept: The monitor robot and Polly the bee doing daily chores in a digital greenhouse, checking on code-plants with a clipboard.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head and the bee mascot watering a digital garden of glowing code-plants. The robot holds a tiny clipboard checking off daily metrics. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head and the bee mascot watering a digital garden of glowing code-plants.
